prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original *F102B* 4.9L flat-12 with a fully balanced and blueprinted *F102C* racing block, featuring forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from *Ferrari Classiche* for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a *Weber 48 IDA* carburetor setup (4x twin-choke 48mm units) tuned by *Bizzarrini Racing* for 520+ HP at 7,800 RPM, with a custom *Capristo* 4-2-1 equal-length stainless header and *SuperSprint* 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system with X-pipe and *REMUS* racing mufflers for optimized scavenging.

Drivetrain: Install a *Hewland LG600* 5-speed dog-ring gearbox with *AP Racing* 5.5-inch twin-plate carbon clutch (ceramic friction), mated to a *GKN* tripod CV joint driveshaft and *Quaife* ATB differential (40% lock) for improved torque transfer. Replace the stock half-shafts with *Pankl Racing* chromoly units and fit *Brembo* GT-R 6-piston calipers with 380mm *PFC* carbon-ceramic rotors (grooved, 3D-printed titanium hats) for endurance braking.

Suspension/Aero: Convert to a *Öhlins TTX40* 3-way adjustable coilover system with *Eibach* ERS springs (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) and *Tillett* spherical bearing top mounts. Install a *KW Automotive* hydraulic bump stop kit and *Whiteline* adjustable anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear). For aero, fit a *Liberty Walk* LM-spec widebody kit (carbon fiber, 100mm wider rear fenders) with a *Rocket Bunny* GT1-style front splitter, *Voltex* GT-style rear diffuser, and *AIM* 1,200kg downforce rear wing (adjustable carbon fiber, 3-element design) tested in *Pininfarina* wind tunnel.
estetica: Body: Full *Ferrari Classiche* restoration with *PPG* Rosso Corsa paint (custom mixed to LM-spec 1979 hue) and *3M* matte clear coat. Replace all glass with *Sekurit* 3mm polycarbonate (Lexan) windows (front windshield with *Saint-Gobain* laminated racing glass) and fit *HRE* FF01 wheels (18x12 front, 18x14 rear) with *Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R* tires (275/35/18 front, 335/30/18 rear). Add *OMP* carbon fiber side mirrors and *Sabelt* 6-point harnesses with *Sparco* carbon fiber seats (LM-spec, FIA 8862-2009 certified).

Interior: Full *Recaro* Pole Position seats (alcantara/leather, red stitching) with *Schroth* 4-inch racing belts and *MOMO* Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede). Install a *Motec* C187 dash logger with *AIM* MXL2 data display, *Bosch* MS4.0 ECU (standalone, mapped by *Novitec*), and *Racepak* V300SD logger. Replace all interior trim with *Alcantara* (custom Ferrari red) and *carbon fiber* (weave-matched to the original LM parts).

Lighting: Convert to *Hella* 90mm Bi-Xenon projector headlights (HID, 5,000K) with *Luxx* LED halo rings and *PIAA* 520 fog lights (yellow lens, 3,000K). Fit *Oracle Lighting* LED taillights (sequential turn signals, carbon fiber housings) and *Rally Innovations* carbon fiber brake cooling ducts with *AeroCatch* quick-release fasteners. Add *Whelen* 700-series strobe lights (hidden behind front grille) for track use.
